hero.name: Ignacio Maruottolo
hero.title: Backend Engineer & CS Student
hero.subtitle: I build scalable systems and automation tools that transform how teams operate across Latin America.

about.p1: I'm a Computer Engineering student at ITBA (4th year) with a self-taught mindset and a deep passion for technology. I specialize in backend development, data engineering, and AI-powered automation.
about.p2: I've led teams as a CTO, contributed to open-source projects like PyTorch, and built production systems that handle real financial flows across Latin America. I love solving hard problems at the intersection of code, data, and business impact.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, I'm tutoring students in Data Structures and Algorithms at ITBA, which keeps me sharp and grounded in fundamentals.

jobs.description: Building cross-team automation systems that accelerate product development across the entire company. Working heavily with AWS and AI to transform payment infrastructure across Latin America.

Developed microservices in C# (.NET 6-9) for a major financial platform, optimizing trading processes and market queries. Built secure RESTful APIs, integrated external brokers and payment gateways, and applied TDD with xUnit/NUnit.

Led the technical strategy as CTO. Designed and implemented AI algorithms for clients, built scalable systems using both SQL and NoSQL databases, and shipped a fully automated process management system.
Support students in one of the core CS courses at ITBA. Run practical sessions, review assignments, and provide individual tutoring.
Co-founded a startup focused on customized home automation systems. Handled product design, development, and client delivery.

items.name: Acrux
items.description: Price tracking system that scrapes products from multiple e-commerce sites and uses AI to match and group them. Delivers a clean pricing matrix for smarter business decisions.

items.name: MON-E
items.description: Language model that classifies credit card transactions and detects fraud using both classical ML algorithms and deep learning approaches.

items.name: Star-Core
items.description: AI-powered multi-purpose web scraper built in Python, designed to run with local LLMs (Llama) with easy extensibility to any model, from local to API-based.

items.name: Oktopus
items.description: Academic multi-agent pentesting system. Explores how autonomous agents can collaborate to perform security assessments in controlled environments.

items.name: MGFF
items.description: Interactive global map of financial flows — imports, exports, remittances, debt, and foreign investment between countries. Built for data visualization and economic research.

items.name: PyTorch (Open Source)
items.description: Open-source contribution to PyTorch's inductor compiler: added graceful handling of matmul operations in foreach_map, improving robustness of the compilation pipeline.

contact.subtitle: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether it's a job, a collaboration, or just a chat about tech — feel free to reach out.
